title: Files, Descriptors, Locks, and RAII-Like C Patterns · Memory Trace: Constructor Destructor Pair
summary: A service reload path owns heap buffers, FILE streams, descriptors, sockets, and mutexes across cancellation and errors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem constructor destructor pair increment in uniform resource-lifetime wrapper. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pair acquisition with one idempotent or guarded release operation and a valid empty state.
Model external handles as scarce lifetime-bound resources even when their storage is not heap memory.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
